debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝² : CompleteLattice α
inst✝¹ : DistribLattice α
inst✝ : BoundedOrder α
S : Set α
R : @refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S
⊢ sSup (@decomposition_of_refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S R) = sSup S

    simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at ha

    intro a ha

rw [decomposition_of_refinement]
  simp_rw [Set.iUnion_eq_biUnion]
  have h : ∀ a ∈ S, ∃! D ∈ R.carrier, a = sSup D := R.carrier_span
  have h₁ : ∀ a ∈ S, ∃ D ∈ R.carrier, a = sSup D := fun a ha ↦ (h a ha).exists
  have h₂ : ∀ D ∈ R.carrier, sSup D ≤ sSup S := by
    intro D hD
    obtain ⟨a, ha, rfl⟩ := h₁ _ (by simpa using hD)
    exact sSup_le fun b hb ↦ le_sSup S hb
  calc
    sSup (⋃ D ∈ R, D) = sSup (⋃ D ∈ R, {sSup D}) := by
      congr
      ext x
      simp_rw [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
      constructor
      · rintro ⟨D, hD, hx⟩
        exact ⟨D, hD, (h _ (by simpa using hD)).unique (by simp [hx])⟩
      · rintro ⟨D, hD, rfl⟩
        obtain ⟨a, ha, rfl⟩ := h₁ _ (by simpa using hD)
        exact ⟨a, ha, rfl⟩
    _ = sSup (Set.image (fun D ↦ sSup D) R.carrier) := by
      simp_rw [Set.biUnion_singleton, Set.image_eq_iUnion]
    _ ≤ sSup S := sSup_le fun D hD ↦ h₂ D hD
    _ ≥ sSup S := by
      refine le_sSup fun a ha ↦ ?_
      obtain ⟨D, hD, rfl⟩ := h₁ a ha
      exact le_sSup (Set.image (fun D ↦ sSup D) R.carrier) ⟨D, hD, rfl⟩

  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, exists_prop, and_imp]
  refine ⟨fun ⟨D, hD, ha⟩ ↦ ?_, fun ha ↦ ?_⟩
  · obtain ⟨D, hD, rfl⟩ := R.carrier_span a ha
    exact ⟨D, hD, le_rfl⟩
  · obtain ⟨a, ha, rfl⟩ := ha
    obtain ⟨D, hD, rfl⟩ := R.carrier_span a ha
    exact ⟨D, hD, le_rfl⟩
